decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id entity_nyc-dot is the correct canonical record for New York City Department of Transportation. No different registry record is a better match.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Select Bus Service (SBS) is coming to Webster Avenue through a partnership between the New York City Department of Transportation (DOT) and MTA New York City Transit (NYCT).

decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id entity_mta-nyct is the correct canonical record for MTA New York City Transit. No different registry record is a better match. do_not_merge_pairs confirm entity_mta-nyct is distinct from entity_mta-entity-update-2025 (authority vs subsidiary).

evidence_refs.source_quote: Select Bus Service (SBS) is coming to Webster Avenue through a partnership between the New York City Department of Transportation (DOT) and MTA New York City Transit (NYCT).

decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id entity_patrick-jordan-webster-sbs is the correct canonical record for Patrick Jordan. No different registry record is a better match.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Contact Patrick Jordan , the Webster Avenue SBS Outreach Representative, at 212-799-8803 or WebsterSBS@Zetlin.com .

decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id entity_community-advisory-committee-webster is the correct canonical record for the Webster Avenue SBS Community Advisory Committee. Distinct from other CACs (34th St Transitway, Flushing-Jamaica, Jamaica, First/Second Ave, Hylan).
